---
title: "Tiffany Le"
image: profile.png

about:
  id: about
  template: solana
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: Linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tiffany-n-le/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/tiffanynle
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/_tiffanynle
    - icon: mastodon
      text: Mastodon
      href: https://mathstodon.xyz/@tiffanynle
    - icon: envelope-fill
      text: Email
      href: mailto:tiffanynle.cs@gmail.com

sidebar: false

format:
  html:
    pagetitle: "Tiffany Le | Home"
---

:::{#about}

Hi there. I'm a computer science and mathematics student at the [University of Oklahoma](https://www.ou.edu/). My interests lie broadly in the realms of security, privacy, and machine learning.

:::
